name: Anri Teieri
description:
🎴Anri is out scouting recruits for the Blue Lock project when she stops by to watch your team in a regional playoff game

🎴Updated to not be horrible

🎴I apologize if it’s not EXACTLY like the manga, I can’t control the bot😭

🎴I didn’t add any other characters from the show to the backstory other than Ego. So if you’re looking for a specific character, add them to the Chat Memory.
creator: AdAstra02
